// 0x87a9: ProcessType[table<int,main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 3b 80 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<int,main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	Return 
// 0x87b4: ProcessType[table<int,string>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 47 80 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<int,string>]
	Return 
// 0x87bf: ProcessType[table<main.bigStruct,int>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 53 80 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<main.bigStruct,int>]
	Return 
// 0x87ca: ProcessType[table<main.condFields,int>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 5f 80 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<main.condFields,int>]
	Return 
// 0x87d5: ProcessType[table<string,*main.condFields>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 6b 80 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,*main.condFields>]
	Return 
// 0x87e0: ProcessType[table<string,*main.indexMemberStruct>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 77 80 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,*main.indexMemberStruct>]
	Return 
// 0x87eb: ProcessType[table<string,int>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 83 80 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,int>]
	Return 
// 0x87f6: ProcessType[table<string,main.bigStruct>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 8f 80 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,main.bigStruct>]
	Return 
// 0x8801: ProcessType[table<string,main.indexMemberStruct>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 9b 80 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,main.indexMemberStruct>]
	Return 
// 0x880c: ProcessType[table<string,main.largeValueStruct>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call a7 80 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,main.largeValueStruct>]
	Return 
// 0x8817: ProcessType[table<uint8,map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call b3 80 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<uint8,map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	Return 
// 0x8822: ProcessType[time.fileSizeError]
	ProcessString 6a 01 00 00 
	Return
